news.title: Hundreds of Millions of iPhones Can Be Hacked With a New Tool Found in the Wild
news.summary: A powerful iPhone-hacking technique known as DarkSword has been discovered in use by Russian hackers. It can take over devices running iOS 18 that simply visit infected websites.
